backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a public query function to transform HTTP outcall responses using the OutCall module.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: updating Instagram links to https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/ in Footer.tsx and Contact.tsx components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, and hooks, documenting the React application structure with TanStack Router, booking form integration with Google Apps Script, and WhatsApp contact number 7096912557.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining design tokens for colors, borders, and UI elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Veda Healar application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component configuring TanStack Router with six routes (Home, About, Services, Book, Testimonials, Contact) wrapped in a Layout component with Navbar, Footer, WhatsAppButton, and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AboutIntro.tsx: About introduction section component displaying Veda Healar's mission with three feature cards (Authentic Vedic Practice, Personalized Guidance, Proven Results) and scroll reveal animation.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Booking form component with validation that submits consultation data (name, email, phone, date, time, service, message) to Google Apps Script endpoint using React Query mutation with error handling and success notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand info, contact details including WhatsApp link to 7096912557, quick navigation links using TanStack Router, and social media icons with Instagram linking to https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section component with cosmic background images, animated sparkles icon, headline text about Vedic wisdom, and call-to-action buttons for booking and exploring services.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Navigation bar component with logo, desktop/mobile menus, scroll-based styling changes, active link highlighting, and a prominent "Book Now" button.
frontend/src/components/PaymentPlacehold: Placeholder component displaying payment information and supported payment methods (Razorpay, Stripe, UPI, Bank Transfer) with commented code structure for future integration.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Reusable service card component with scroll reveal animation, displaying service icon, name, description, price, and a "Book Now" link with service ID parameter.
frontend/src/components/ServicesOverview: Services overview section displaying a grid of five service cards (numerology, name correction, lucky numbers, reiki, business name analysis) with scroll animations and a link to view all services.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSlid: Auto-rotating testimonials slider with manual navigation arrows, displaying client reviews with star ratings, quotes, and names over a mandala background.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp button in bottom-right corner that opens a chat with pre-filled message to a specific phone number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, using React Query for caching and automatically invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Reserved file for React Query hooks to interact with backend; currently empty with commented example structure since booking submits directly to Google Sheets.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: Custom React hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when elements enter viewport and trigger reveal animations, unobserving after first visibility.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens (colors, radius) for light/dark themes, font families (Inter, Playfair Display), scroll reveal animations, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page describing Veda Healar's mission to bridge Vedic wisdom with modern spiritual guidance, featuring scroll-reveal sections for story, mission, and guiding principles with icons.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: Consultation booking page with form for scheduling online sessions, displays success confirmation after submission, and includes payment placeholder component.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying location, WhatsApp, email, business hours, and social media links with scroll-reveal animations and call-to-action to book consultations.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage component composing HeroSection, ServicesOverview, AboutIntro, and TestimonialsSlider components into a single landing page layout.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page component displaying a grid of 5 service offerings (numerology, name correction, lucky numbers, reiki healing, business name analysis) with hero section, service cards, and CTA section for booking consultations.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page component showing 6 client reviews with ratings, featuring a hero section, testimonial cards grid, and CTA section linking to the booking page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (deepBlue, goldAccent, beigeBackground), font families (Playfair Display, Inter), and extending default theme with shadcn UI design tokens and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking two completed features for updating Instagram social media links in Footer component and Contact page to https://www.instagram.com/vedahealar/.
